positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration featuring stylized flora, celestial bodies, and woodland creatures woven together. Central composition of glowing crescent moons, intricate star constellations, and bioluminescent forest flowers. Use a deep indigo and teal color palette with accents of aged gold leaf and cream highlights. The style must be clean linework illustration, reminiscent of engraved botanical sketches mixed with modern minimalist tattoo art. Focus on strong, bold silhouettes and negative space. Seamlessly tileable quality. Perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, smudge, grainy, noisy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, poor anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, photorealism, 3D render, gradient wash, messy, chaotic, illegible
